LABEL: Supplemental HRSN Disability 1: Serious Difficulty Concentrating, Remembering, or Making Decisions 

DESCRIPTION: Screening result (SR) Supplemental health related social need (HRSN) disabilities variable where 
patient has serious difficulty concentrating, remembering, or making decisions due to physical,
